hero.headline: Outdoor jacuzzis for homes, guesthouses, and hotels.
hero.subhead: An outdoor jacuzzi is a ten-year decision. We help you pick one you'll still want to use a thousand evenings later. Hydromassage models for two, four, or six people. Indoor and outdoor variants. Delivered to every county in Romania.

featured.title: Three jacuzzis, picked for how you'll actually use them
featured.description: Three outdoor jacuzzis from the WaterVibe collection. Each one balances room, finish, and a hydromassage you can feel. Pick the size that fits — a couple, a family of four, or a full table.

brandStory.title: An outdoor jacuzzi, not a product. A spa experience that stays home.
brandStory.intro: Why WaterVibe exists, how we pick each model, what you actually get. Three short chapters.
brandStory.pullquote: Bringing the spa home. To every Romanian house, guesthouse, and hotel that wants one.
brandStory.paragraph1: Life fills up. Real quiet keeps getting rarer. An outdoor jacuzzi at home turns any evening into a ritual. You stop waiting for the next holiday or the next spa weekend.
brandStory.paragraph2: Every model earns its place. We check four things — comfort, material quality, hydromassage that still feels like hydromassage two years in, and a power bill you can live with. For two, four, or six people. Indoor or outdoor. In finishes that sit well next to whatever's already there.
brandStory.paragraph3: What you get: a hot tub that still runs on the hundredth evening. A real conversation about your space. A delivered price for Romania. Installation steps you can hand to your builder. Wherever you are in the country.

testimonials.title: Real owners, a year on. Still in the water every week.

hero.title: Outdoor jacuzzis for homes, guesthouses, and hotels. Brought closer to Romania.
hero.subhead: Three chapters on why WaterVibe exists, how we pick each jacuzzi, and what you actually get. Delivered and supported across the country.

chapter1.title: Why WaterVibe exists
chapter1.paragraph1: WaterVibe started from a simple idea. Real relaxation shouldn't be a once-a-year luxury you only get on holiday.
chapter1.paragraph2: Every home, every guesthouse, every hotel can have a place set aside for letting go. A spot where the body unwinds, the head steps out of the day, and time with family or guests turns into something memorable.
chapter1.paragraph3: Water does the work. Hydromassage loosens muscle tension. Warm water releases the clench in your shoulders. The jets get circulation moving. Within a few minutes, you're somewhere else. That's the point of WaterVibe. We don't sell jacuzzis. We sell the evenings that follow them.
chapter1.paragraph4: An outdoor jacuzzi changes the space around the house. The terrace becomes somewhere to unwind. The courtyard becomes somewhere to meet. Evenings slow down. For guesthouses and hotels, a property with a jacuzzi turns a booking into the thing guests talk about when they get home.

chapter2.title: How we pick every jacuzzi
chapter2.paragraph1: WaterVibe has one job. Offer water-based relaxation that fits as many spaces, styles, and budgets in Romania as we can find.
chapter2.paragraph2: Every model earns its place. We check comfort, material quality, hydromassage performance, and the reliability of the technical systems. The collection is built around outdoor jacuzzis you can use every week without babying them.
chapter2.paragraph3: The range covers real needs. Two-person hot tubs for couples. Four-seat models for the whole family. Six-seat outdoor jacuzzis for groups of friends, or for guesthouses and small hotels. Compact models for tight terraces and courtyards. Spacious models for bigger properties.
chapter2.paragraph4: Jet configurations vary by model. Each seat massages a different zone. Neck, back, lumbar, calves. You feel the day leave you one muscle group at a time.
chapter2.paragraph5: Design matters as much as specs. We pick finishes that sit well in modern and classic spaces alike. A jacuzzi should complete a terrace or garden, not compete with it. The technology follows the same rule. Filtration, heating, and water control picked for comfort first and sensible energy use second.
chapter2.paragraph6: The last step is the conversation. We look at the space, how many people will use the tub, and how it fits with the terrace or interior you already have. You leave with the right model, a delivered price for Romania, and clear technical steps for the install.

chapter3.title: What you actually get
chapter3.paragraph1: WaterVibe lists modern hydromassage jacuzzis for private homes, guesthouses, and hotels in Romania. Every model is picked for comfort, durability, and a hydromassage that still feels like hydromassage two years in.
chapter3.paragraph2: Depending on the space and the taste, the choice opens up. Indoor or outdoor models. Different sizes. Different seat counts. Different jet layouts. Different finishes. The goal is simple. You find a jacuzzi that suits both the space and its style, without giving anything up on build quality.
chapter3.paragraph3: For guesthouses and hotels, a jacuzzi lifts the property. It shows up in reviews. We walk through usage flow, cleaning rhythm, and how the hot tub fits into your accommodation offer.
chapter3.paragraph4: Consultation is part of what we do. We explain the differences between models, help you pick the right one for your head count and how you'll use it, and hand over a delivered price for Romania with clear installation steps.

ensama.title: Operated by ENSAMA SRL, Câmpina
